channel.title: markdown on Yip Wenjun's Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in markdown on Yip Wenjun's Portfolio

item.title: Test markdown
item.author: 352453656@qq.com (Yip Vincent)
item.description: You can write regular markdown here and Hugo will automatically convert it to a nice webpage. I strongly encourage you to take 5 minutes to learn how to write in markdown - it’ll teach you how to transform regular text into bold/italics/headings/tables/etc.
